canonicalSpecs.purpose: Authored source structure and generated code boundaries.
Reusable module and package boundary rules.
Rust RPC adapter, metadata, manifest, and verification rules.
Language-neutral RPC contract and service manifest rules.

integration.authority: Root SDKWork specs remain authoritative. Local specs may narrow this component but must not contradict them.
integration.dependencyPolicy: Consumers integrate through package-root public exports, declared runtime entrypoints, generated SDK clients, or documented adapters only.
integration.sdkPolicy: Dependency-owned APIs remain in dependency SDKs or approved composed wrappers; generated SDK output is not hand-edited.
integration.languagePolicy: Rust code follows Cargo workspace dependencies and the SDKWork Rust crate responsibility split.

exceptions.reason: IAM RPC service manifests and proto contracts are authored, but no runnable RPC server registers with sdkwork-discovery in this base dependency repository yet.
exceptions.scope: sdkwork-discovery registration and RPC server bootstrap
